title: Spectral-branding /guide routing — role accelerators over the open corpus
description: Generated role map for the /guide page and machine signpost. Routes a visitor (cohort) to a fast path through the corpus, reusing the consult decision routes. An accelerator, not a gate: every role carries the `other` fallback and an expand_via neighbourhood; seeds are entry points, not answer sets.
generated: Generated projection of the shared decision/role taxonomy over the open corpus substrate. Do not hand-edit; regenerated from source.

roles.label: CMO / Brand lead
roles.one_liner: A brand, like colour, is completed in the observer — measure the perception you do not control.
roles.jtbd: Diagnose a brand's perception, find perception gaps across audiences, and act on them.
roles.next_action: See your brand's shape in minutes (Brand Spectrometer), then read it back through the anchor claims.
roles.byoai_cta: Point your agent at the SBT reading path on GitHub (spine + claims), not the PDFs.

roles.label: COO / Operations
roles.one_liner: Make the operating model you DO control explicit, testable, and validated layer by layer.
roles.jtbd: Specify or stress-test the operating model; diagnose dysfunction as a specification defect, not an execution failure.
roles.next_action: Specify your business top-down (orgschema-toolkit), or run a six-level OrgSchema Audit for stress-test.
roles.byoai_cta: Point your agent at the OST reading path on GitHub (six-tier spine + audit claims).

roles.label: CEO / Board
roles.one_liner: Direction, not intensity, is the consequential bet — which tier and which dimension you point the firm at.
roles.jtbd: Set strategy and portfolio; evaluate an M&A or a reorg at the tier grain, not the logo.
roles.next_action: Ask schema-consult the decision (invest / acquire / reorganize); it routes to the measured basis.
roles.byoai_cta: Point your agent at the tier-allocation + tier-rotation spines and the six-tier ontology.

roles.one_liner: Turn 'where should we invest?' into a measurement: where does resolvable perception headroom actually sit?

roles.next_action: Measure the alignment gap per dimension (Brand Spectrometer), then weight by tier-specific decay.

roles.next_action: Read the LaTeX spines; the proofs and bounds live at L2 (SPINE.yaml), not the prose.
